note: AI critical-IT MW + unit economics across the AI build-out cohort: neoclouds, powered-shell landlords, operators, and hyperscalers (incl. private builders xAI and OpenAI/Stargate). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-21-capacity-tracker-design.md. op/con/plan = verify-adjusted critical-IT AI MW; hyperscaler MW are estimates (no filing-grade critical-IT split is disclosed). cap/nd/bk in $B. Derived analytics (EV, weighted MW, EV/MW, coverage, %energized) are computed at render time, not stored. dupe!=null => excluded from de-duped cohort totals.
